


## Code used for PA selection

Here we describe the code used to select the protected areas (PAs) analysed in 3 working packages (WU1.1 on deforestation, WU1.2 on fires, and WU2.1 on livelihoods).

First we used the package git2r to fetch the corresponding repositories.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(git2r)

# Fetch 
```


## Data sources


## Filtering conditions
